content.text:
All deliverables are complete, applied to production, verified, and pushed. Here's the summary.

## Backend changes shipped (commit `45af984`)

### 1. Schema — 8 new `product` fields (all read-only)
`pm-system/add-clickup-hierarchy-fields.mjs` (additive/idempotent) added: `clickup_space_id`, `clickup_space_name`, `clickup_folder_id`, `clickup_folder_name`, `clickup_creator_id`, `clickup_creator_name`, `clickup_time_estimate_ms` (`bigint`), `clickup_orderindex` (`varchar`). `clickup_list_id`/`clickup_list_name` already existed.

### 2. Backfill — run in production
`pm-system/migration/backfill-clickup-hierarchy.mjs` (DRY_RUN default, `APPLY=1` to write, checkpointed):
- **Hierarchy:** all **17,859** products resolved, **0 unmatched** (1 ambiguous list name disambiguated via the task endpoint), written in 19 batched `updateItems` calls.
- **Metadata:** **17,858** products got creator/time_estimate/orderindex (only 9 stray ClickUp tasks had no product row).

### 3. Ongoing sync updated
`clickup-work-import.mjs` (builds a space-name map, handles hidden/folderless `folder → null`) and `clickup-import-workspace-lists.mjs` (captures space/folder ids) now write all new fields on every upsert.

### 4 & 5. Verification (Postgres + API)
| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `has_space` / `has_list_id` | **17859** = total ✓ |
| `has_folder` | 17705 (154 folderless correctly null) ✓ |
| `has_creator` / `has_orderindex` | 17858 ✓ |
| `has_time_estimate` | 123 (ClickUp returns null when unset) ✓ |
| Column types | `time_estimate_ms`=bigint, `orderindex`=varchar ✓ |
| **`description`** | already **TEXT** (max len 13,284) — **no widening needed** ✓ |
| Read perms | Designer/Viewer explicit + Sales/Licensing wildcard — all 9 readable ✓ |
| `orderindex` sort | `::numeric` cast sorts the 32-decimal strings correctly ✓ |

Spot check (`Licensing Management`): space `POP Creations`, folder `Design Management`, list_id `13194624`, creator populated — exactly as spec predicted.

### Hierarchy tree for the frontend team
```
POP Creations / Design Management        / Licensing Management            11575
POP Creations / Design Management        / Customer Refresh                 2721
POP Creations / Design Management        / New Prod Development              659
POP Creations / Design Management        / Customer Category Expansion       506
POP Creations / Design Management        / Licensor's projects              141
POP Creations / Design Management        / Freelancers Licensed              74
POP Creations / Design Management        / Sourcing/Sampling Projects        18
POP Creations / Licensed Team Admin Task / Licensing Administration Tasks   560
POP Creations / Other Projects           / Carlos                             1
Spruce Line   / Edge Home Folder         / Edge Generic                    1279
Spruce Line   / Edge Home Folder         / General Presentations             80
Spruce Line   / Edge Home Folder         / Dev                               17
Spruce Line   / Edge Home Folder         / Nathalie - Tasks                   3
Spruce Line   / (no folder)              / Freelancers Generic              133
Spruce Line   / (no folder)              / Store Shopping                    20
Spruce Line   / (no folder)              / New Prod Ideas                     1
designflow    / Development              / Sprint 3                          29
designflow    / Development              / Sprint 2                          25
designflow    / Development              / Sprint 1                          17
```

Two notes for the frontend:
- **`clickup_time_estimate_ms` is sparse** — only 123 of 17,859 tasks have an estimate set in ClickUp; the rest are null (not 0). Treat null as "no estimate."
- **Sort `clickup_orderindex` with a numeric cast** (`::numeric` / `Number()` won't hold the precision) — it's stored as text on purpose.

No Directus restart was needed (field additions are immediate; no Flow changes). The frontend can now add the fields to `types.ts`/`PRODUCT_SUMMARY_FIELDS` and request them by name.
